author: @industrialmonk
text: I have been thinking of getting a 3d printer for 10 years but as I am off grid & only had 230v ac on a generator haven't but I am creating a system to have 24/7 power & I will get a 3d printer when it's complete you have convinced me I should as I have been a bit sceptical in the past.

replies.author: @mattg6472
replies.text: How annoying is that? They have made it so I can't view their comment outside of my notifications and when I reply to them my comment is deleted seconds after

replies.author: @mattg6472
replies.text: Who has the power to do this?! You tube themselves? Hackers? Robert as well but I know it's not Robert . I know they do the draw in a later video and I'm supposed to claim at that email address in that description of that video..

replies.author: @RTR-MATEY
replies.text: If I can go to their account page, I find the YouTube assistance link, three dots I think on the upper right. I just title the request "SPAM USER ACCOUNT" which then brings up another screen where you can highlight their account information and REPORT THEM!!! This is on an android phone with the YouTube app. Cheers!!!😁👍🏻
